name: RASPUTINA
title: WINTER'S TEETH

abilities.name: Amplify Power
abilities.text: When this model empowers a duel, it receives +1 to its duel total.

abilities.name: Ice Mirror
abilities.text: When this model declares a (t) action, it may target any model within 2" of a friendly Ice Pillar marker, ignoring range and LoS.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (warding) abilities of other models.

actions.name: Winter's Strike
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, the target gains either a Slow or a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Strong Winds
triggers.text: Move the target 2" for every (t) in this action's final duel total.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Hunger Pangs
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an allied beast or model with a friendly Hunger token. Target declares the Charge action, ignoring engagement, controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Spirit of Hunger
triggers.text: Summon a Wendigo within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Ice Pillars
actions.effects: Make an Ice Pillar marker anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Frozen Domain
triggers.text: Make an Ice Pillar marker anywhere on the friendly table half, in this model's LoS. Allies within (aura)2" of the made marker gain a Shielded token.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='WINTER'S TEETH' back='Winter's Teeth'
extraction_notes: The (warding) symbol in Ruthless ability is represented with the unicode character visible on card
